attacking_style: Not a primary attacker. Functions as a leadout specialist and intermediate sprint worker, operating in service of team objectives rather than personal results.
team_tactics: Deploys in longer leadout trains and intermediate sprint point-gathering operations. Used tactically for jersey competitions rather than stage victory setups.
terrain_preference: Flat, technical finales where leadout trains function. Intermediate sprint points on flat roads. Avoids sustained climbing scenarios.
vulnerability: Longer leadout trains can be beaten by shorter, fresher efforts through technical sequences. Energy expenditure on intermediate sprints may compromise finale effectiveness.
key_patterns: Works intermediate sprints for team points jersey campaigns (2 observations)
Functions in leadout capacity rather than finishing role (2 observations)
Operates within Quick-Step/Soudal tactical framework as domestique specialist (2 observations)
form_trajectory: unknown: Limited recent data, with 5-year gap between observations making trajectory assessment impossible
